name: Transcription Pipeline Template
description: Flex Template for the Audio Transcription Pipeline (Dataflow).

parameters.name: input_topic
parameters.label: Input Topic
parameters.helpText: Full path of the Pub/Sub topic to read from (e.g. projects/your-project/topics/raw-audio-topic).

parameters.name: output_topic
parameters.label: Output Topic
parameters.helpText: Full path of the Pub/Sub topic to publish transcribed text to.

parameters.name: stitched_audio_bucket
parameters.label: Stitched Audio Bucket
parameters.helpText: GCS bucket for storing clean, stitched audio. If omitted, binary output is skipped.

parameters.name: max_transmission_duration_ms
parameters.label: Max Transmission Duration (MS)
parameters.helpText: Absolute limit on continuous transmission duration.

parameters.name: route_to_dlq
parameters.label: Route to DLQ
parameters.helpText: If false, exception bubbles immediately instead of Pub/Sub DLQ.
